title: 外调品分析
description: 从外部工厂调入产品的总量、结构、来源与物流成本分析

kpis.label: 本月外调量（吨）
kpis.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(deliv_qty_mt),1) as v FROM sales_delivery WHERE is_external_transfer=1 AND strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202603' AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL
kpis.help: 当月外调品实际提货量

kpis.label: 外调占比
kpis.sql: SELECT ROUND(100.0*SUM(CASE WHEN is_external_transfer=1 THEN deliv_qty_mt ELSE 0 END)/NULLIF(SUM(deliv_qty_mt),0),1) as v FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202603' AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL
kpis.help: 外调量占总提货量的百分比

kpis.label: 外调提单数
kpis.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT delivnum) as v FROM sales_delivery WHERE is_external_transfer=1 AND strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202603' AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL

kpis.label: 物流成本溢价（元/吨）
kpis.sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN is_external_transfer=1 THEN logistics_cost_per_mt ELSE 0 END) - AVG(CASE WHEN is_external_transfer=0 THEN logistics_cost_per_mt ELSE 0 END), 1) as v FROM sales_delivery WHERE deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL
kpis.help: 外调品相比本地供货每吨多出的平均物流成本

stages.title: 月度趋势
stages.description: 最近6个月外调品总量与外调占比走势
stages.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', deliv_crt_time) as 月份, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN is_external_transfer=1 THEN deliv_qty_mt ELSE 0 END),1) as 外调量_吨, ROUND(SUM(deliv_qty_mt),1) as 总量_吨, ROUND(100.0*SUM(CASE WHEN is_external_transfer=1 THEN deliv_qty_mt ELSE 0 END)/NULLIF(SUM(deliv_qty_mt),0),1) as 外调占比_pct FROM sales_delivery WHERE deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', deliv_crt_time) ORDER BY 月份 DESC LIMIT 6
stages.insight_focus: 外调量的月度趋势是上升还是改善？占比有无压降？

stages.title: 产品结构
stages.description: 外调依赖度最高的TOP10产品
stages.sql: SELECT deliv_mat_name as 产品, ROUND(SUM(deliv_qty_mt),1) as 外调量_吨, ROUND(100.0*SUM(deliv_qty_mt)/NULLIF((SELECT SUM(deliv_qty_mt) FROM sales_delivery WHERE is_external_transfer=1 AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL),0),1) as 占比_pct FROM sales_delivery WHERE is_external_transfer=1 AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL GROUP BY deliv_mat_name ORDER BY 外调量_吨 DESC LIMIT 10
stages.insight_focus: 哪些产品外调依赖度最高？是否本地有生产能力？

stages.title: 来源工厂
stages.description: 外调品来自哪些工厂，各自承担多少量
stages.sql: SELECT deliv_sply_plant_descrptn as 供货工厂, ROUND(SUM(deliv_qty_mt),1) as 外调量_吨, COUNT(DISTINCT delivnum) as 提单数 FROM sales_delivery WHERE is_external_transfer=1 AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL GROUP BY deliv_sply_plant_descrptn ORDER BY 外调量_吨 DESC
stages.insight_focus: 主要依赖哪些外部工厂？集中度如何？

stages.title: 成本对比
stages.description: 外调品与本地供货的物流成本差异
stages.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN is_external_transfer=1 THEN '外调品' ELSE '本地供货' END as 来源类型, ROUND(AVG(logistics_cost_per_mt),1) as 平均物流成本_元每吨, ROUND(SUM(deliv_qty_mt),1) as 提货量_吨, COUNT(DISTINCT delivnum) as 提单数 FROM sales_delivery WHERE deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL GROUP BY is_external_transfer ORDER BY is_external_transfer DESC
stages.insight_focus: 每吨物流成本差异多大？总成本溢出约为多少？

summary_prompt: 根据以上外调品分析数据（趋势、产品结构、来源工厂、成本对比），请以供应链管理层视角总结：1)核心问题，2)关键数字，3)最优先的2个改善方向。不超过150字，语言直接。
